channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: 38A: False Parker
item.description: After an service obstruction there are different intervals. [On 29.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
After an service obstruction there are different intervals.
[On 29.05.2026]

item.title: 2A: traffic congestion
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: traffic congestion. [On 29.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: traffic congestion.
[On 29.05.2026]

item.title: Matzleinsdorfer Platz under structure ÖBB
item.description: In order to improve and increase the safety measures during the tunnelling work of the underground construction, one of the two … will be placed under the bridge structure of … [Since 14.03.2021]
item.content:encoded:
In order to improve and increase the safety measures during the tunnelling work of the underground construction, one of the two … will be placed under the bridge structure of …
[Since 14.03.2021]

item.title: U2: Right Vienna line from crossing Ramperstorffergasse to crossing Pilgramgasse and Pilgrambrücke
item.description: For the new construction of the underground station of the U2 Pilgramgasse, the right-hand Vienna line from the Ramperstorffergasse to the Pilgramgasse is blocked for vehicle … [Since 28.02.2021]
item.content:encoded:
For the new construction of the underground station of the U2 Pilgramgasse, the right-hand Vienna line from the Ramperstorffergasse to the Pilgramgasse is blocked for vehicle …
[Since 28.02.2021]

item.title: U2/U5: Bacherplatz from Arbeitergasse to Schwarzhorngasse
item.description: Detailed information about the construction project U2 / U5 can be obtained via the ombudsperson of the respective metro section. [Since 28.02.2021]
item.content:encoded:
Detailed information about the construction project U2 / U5 can be obtained via the ombudsperson of the respective metro section.
[Since 28.02.2021]

item.title: U2/U5: Kirchengasse 1 to 30
item.description: In the Lindengasse / Kirchengasse crossing area and in the Kirchengasse at the height of ON 1 and ON 20-22, the underground station digs into the shafts. [Since 28.02.2021]
item.content:encoded:
In the Lindengasse / Kirchengasse crossing area and in the Kirchengasse at the height of ON 1 and ON 20-22, the underground station digs into the shafts.
[Since 28.02.2021]

item.title: U2/U5: Volksgartenstraße 2
item.description: The Volksgartenstraße between the Hansenstraße and the Museumstraße will block a lane in order to handle the construction site traffic for the underground construction. [Since 28.02.2021]
item.content:encoded:
The Volksgartenstraße between the Hansenstraße and the Museumstraße will block a lane in order to handle the construction site traffic for the underground construction.
[Since 28.02.2021]

item.title: U2/U5: Siebenbrunnengasse from junction Siebenbrunnenplatz and Reinprechtsdorfer Straße to 44
item.description: Detailed information about the construction project U2 / U5 can be obtained via the ombudsperson of the respective metro section. [Since 28.02.2021]
item.content:encoded:
Detailed information about the construction project U2 / U5 can be obtained via the ombudsperson of the respective metro section.
[Since 28.02.2021]

item.title: U2/U5: Mariahilfer Street from Stiftgasse to Erika-Weinzierl-Platz and Kirchengasse
item.description: Detailed information about the construction project U2 / U5 can be obtained from the ombudsperson of the respective metro section. since 12. June 2023 the … will be [Since 28.02.2021]
item.content:encoded:
Detailed information about the construction project U2 / U5 can be obtained from the ombudsperson of the respective metro section. since 12. June 2023 the … will be
[Since 28.02.2021]

item.title: Linzer Straße from junction Hüttelbergstraße and Bergmillergasse to junction Wolfersberggasse
item.description: The stop of the affected bus lines at the Bujattigasse will be temporarily moved to the Wolfersberggasse ON 1. [19.04.2026 – 31.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The stop of the affected bus lines at the Bujattigasse will be temporarily moved to the Wolfersberggasse ON 1.
[19.04.2026 – 31.07.2026]
